description_long: This object is a long, narrow, and slightly curved component resembling a chainsaw bar with a cutting chain attached. The bar appears to be made of metal, with a dark, matte finish and fine, evenly spaced teeth running along its length, characteristic of a chainsaw chain. Both ends of the bar have short, perpendicular extensions, likely for mounting or attachment to a chainsaw body. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The object lacks visible controls, handles, or safety guards, suggesting it is a component rather than a complete chainsaw. Its proportions and construction indicate it is intended for heavy-duty cutting tasks in urban or industrial environments.
description: A long, dark, slightly curved chainsaw bar with a toothed cutting chain and perpendicular mounting ends, lacking visible handles or safety features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bar's thickness and the curve of the cutting chain, with perpendicular mounting ends visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full length of the bar and the continuous toothed chain along its edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, showing the bar's thickness and the chain's profile.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view displaying the bar's length and the alignment of the mounting ends, with the chain's teeth visible along the edge.
attribute_handle_design: No handles are present; only mounting ends are visible at both sides of the bar.
